title: Flexbox
content:
### Flex Container

Turn any element into a flex container:

```html
<div class="flex">    /* display: flex */
<div class="inline-flex"> /* display: inline-flex */
```

### Flex Direction

Control the main axis direction:

```html
<div class="flex flex-row">        /* row (default) */
<div class="flex flex-row-reverse"> /* row reverse */
<div class="flex flex-col">         /* column */
<div class="flex flex-col-reverse"> /* column reverse */
```

### Justify Content (Main Axis)

```html
<div class="flex justify-start">   /* flex-start */
<div class="flex justify-end">     /* flex-end */
<div class="flex justify-center">  /* center */
<div class="flex justify-between"> /* space-between */
<div class="flex justify-around">  /* space-around */
<div class="flex justify-evenly">  /* space-evenly */
```

### Align Items (Cross Axis)

```html
<div class="flex items-start">     /* align-items: flex-start */
<div class="flex items-end">       /* align-items: flex-end */
<div class="flex items-center">    /* align-items: center */
<div class="flex items-baseline">  /* align-items: baseline */
<div class="flex items-stretch">   /* align-items: stretch */
```

### Flex Wrap

```html
<div class="flex flex-wrap">          /* allow wrapping */
<div class="flex flex-wrap-reverse">  /* wrap reverse */
<div class="flex flex-nowrap">        /* no wrapping */
```

### Flex Grow & Shrink

```html
<div class="flex-1">    /* flex: 1 1 0% (grow & shrink) */
<div class="flex-auto"> /* flex: 1 1 auto */
<div class="flex-none"> /* flex: none (no grow/shrink) */
<div class="grow">      /* flex-grow: 1 */
<div class="grow-0">    /* flex-grow: 0 */
<div class="shrink">    /* flex-shrink: 1 */
<div class="shrink-0">  /* flex-shrink: 0 */
```

### Gap Utilities

Space between flex items:

```html
<div class="flex gap-0">     /* gap: 0px */
<div class="flex gap-4">     /* gap: 1rem */
<div class="flex gap-x-4">   /* column gap */
<div class="flex gap-y-2">   /* row gap */
<div class="flex gap-8">     /* gap: 2rem */
```

### Order

```html
<div class="order-1">    /* order: 1 */
<div class="order-2">    /* order: 2 */
<div class="order-first">/* order: -9999 */
<div class="order-last"> /* order: 9999 */
<div class="order-none"> /* order: 0 */
```

### Align Self

Override alignment for a single item:

```html
<div class="self-auto">     /* align-self: auto */
<div class="self-start">    /* align-self: flex-start */
<div class="self-end">      /* align-self: flex-end */
<div class="self-center">   /* align-self: center */
<div class="self-stretch">  /* align-self: stretch */
```
codeExample:
Logo
  • Home
  • About
  • Contact

quiz.question: Which class distributes flex items with equal space between them?
What does flex-1 do to a flex child?
options: Allows it to grow and shrink equally
